LESSON PLAN
Subject: Basic Science | Class: PRIMARY_6 | Board: UBEC

Objective: By the end of this lesson, students will be able to name the key concepts in Basic Science as specified by the UBEC curriculum.

Activity: Students work in groups of four. Each group receives a scenario card based on a familiar Nigerian context. They must name the relevant concept and present their findings to the class. Names used: Chidi, Fatima, Ngozi, Aminu, Taiwo, Adaeze.

Assessment: Exit quiz of five questions. Students scoring below 40% receive guided practice. Marks allocated per UBEC continuous assessment guidelines.
